name: Oven-Roasted Potatoes with Fresh Herbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. Clean and quarter the potatoes. Toss with the remaining ingredients until well coated.
3. Lightly wipe or spray a baking pan with vegetable oil.
4. Place the potatoes in a single layer on the pan and bake for 30 minutes, until the potatoes are soft and brown.
